overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Temple of Apollo. The player character walks through the ancient Greek temple interior, approaches a massive marble statue of Apollo, examines the offerings and architecture, and exits past torch-bearing guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance corridor with view to main sanctuary

events.description: character begins ascending the steps toward the statue platform

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple entrance corridor toward the main chamber

notable_agents.action: robed temple attendant walking left across the corridor
robed figure walking toward the sanctuary

entered.detail: massive marble statue of Apollo holding a lyre, illuminated from below by firelight
fluted Greek columns with teal painted walls between them
fluted Greek columns with teal painted walls between them
burning fire pit in bronze bowl on tripod stand
burning fire pit in bronze bowl on tripod stand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view down the temple entrance corridor, flanked by stone columns and burning braziers. The massive Apollo statue dominates the far end of the hall. The player character walks forward while robed NPCs move through the space, and the camera approaches the steps leading to the sanctuary platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: main sanctuary with central cult statue and offering altars

events.description: moves from entrance corridor onto the raised statue platform
character begins circling the statue base to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: ascending the steps and circling the base of the Apollo statue to examine offerings and details

notable_agents.action: robed attendant kneeling and arranging offerings at the statue base

entered.detail: stone platform with burning fire, bronze vessels, and scattered rose petals
large ceremonial bowl on tripod stand containing offerings
green banner with bull skull emblem hanging on the teal wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends onto the sanctuary platform and circles the massive Apollo statue, examining the burning offerings and bronze vessels at its base. A kneeling attendant arranges offerings nearby. The camera tilts up to show the statue's full height against the coffered ceiling, then moves around to reveal wall hangings and side details.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple nave with side chambers and exit portico

events.description: character turns away from the statue and walks toward the temple exit
approaching the exit portico with guards holding torches

agents.ego_description: turning away from the statue and walking toward the temple exit, passing other worshippers

notable_agents.action: female worshipper in white dress standing and gesturing toward the statue
two guards in armor holding torches flanking the exit doorway

entered.detail: large doorway with wooden frame leading to outdoor greenery visible beyond
ancient Greek style murals depicting figures on the teal walls above columns
white draped fabric hanging between columns creating soft divisions

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the statue and explores the temple nave, revealing wall paintings and decorative screens. A female worshipper gestures toward the sanctuary. The camera continues toward the exit portico where two armored guards stand with torches, framing the view of greenery outside as the exploration concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior of the Temple of Apollo, transitioning from a grand entrance corridor to the intimate details of the sanctuary before exiting toward the outdoors. It begins by moving down a columned hall flanked by burning braziers, approaching the massive statue of Apollo that dominates the far end of the space. As the character ascends the sanctuary platform, the camera circles the statue to examine bronze vessels and burning offerings before tilting upward to reveal the full height of the figure against the coffered ceiling. The scene then shifts away from the altar to explore the temple nave, passing decorative screens and wall paintings as a worshipper gestures toward the sanctuary. Finally, the camera glides toward the exit portico, passing two armored guards with torches who frame a view of the lush greenery outside.
